# ADsBlocking Guide
> How to block ads using Firefox, uBlock Origin, user scripts, and other privacy tools.

## Tools
- [Firefox Browser](https://www.mozilla.org/firefox/)
- [uBlock Origin](https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/ublock-origin/)
- [Violentmonkey](https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/violentmonkey/)
- [Tampermonkey](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/tampermonkey/)
- [Link Bypasser Script](https://codeberg.org/gongchandang49/bypass-all-shortlinks-debloated/)

## Optional Extensions
- [Privacy Badger](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/privacy-badger17/)
- [Return YouTube Dislikes](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/return-youtube-dislikes/)
- [SponsorBlock](https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/sponsorblock/)
- [DeArrow](https://dearrow.ajay.app/)

## Utilities
- [MAS Windows Activation](https://massgrave.dev/)
- [Clean OS ISOs](https://os.click/en)
- [IDM Trial Reset](https://github.com/J2TEAM/idm-trial-reset/releases/tag/v1.0.0)
- [qBittorrent](https://www.qbittorrent.org/download)
- [AB Download Manager](https://abdownloadmanager.com/)
- [WinUtil by Chris Titus](https://github.com/ChrisTitusTech/winutil)
- [Morphe](https://morphe.software/)
- [ReVanced Non-Root](https://github.com/FiorenMas/Revanced-And-Revanced-Extended-Non-Root)

## Resource Collections
- [FMHY](https://fmhy.net/)
- [Free for Dev](https://free-for.dev/)
- [Public APIs](https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis)
- [r/Piracy Megathread](https://old.reddit.com/r/Piracy/wiki/megathread)

## Support
- [uBlock Origin (Raymond Hill)](https://github.com/gorhill/uBlock#readme)
- [Violentmonkey](https://github.com/violentmonkey/violentmonkey)
- [Tampermonkey](https://www.tampermonkey.net/)
- [EFF (Privacy Badger)](https://www.eff.org/)
- [Return YouTube Dislikes](https://returnyoutubedislike.com/donate)
- [SponsorBlock (Ajay Ramachandran)](https://sponsor.ajay.app/)
- [Mozilla Foundation](https://www.mozilla.org/foundation/)
